Her recently released biography, "The Optimist," tracks Sam Altman from St. Louis coder to OpenAI CEO. Hagey warned that Altman's fate depends on "a deal-maker's luck" after a board revolt showed how fragile OpenAI's nonprofit-over-for-profit structure remains.
